transcript: Speaker A: ಏ ಮನೋಜ್, ಇರು ಇರು. ನಿಂಗ್ ಜಾಬ್ ಸಿಕ್ಕಿದೆ ಅಂತೆ, ಅದೂ 30,000 ಸಂಬಳ. ನಿಂಗ್ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಬರಲ್ಲ, ಆದ್ರೂ ಹೇಗೆ? [Hey Manoj, wait wait. I heard you got a job, that too with a 30,000 salary. You don't know how to speak English, but how?] Speaker B: Who told you that? I learned speaking English in just 15 days. And ಜಾಬ್ ಕೂಡ ಸಿಕ್ಕಿದೆ. [And also got a job.] Speaker A: ನೀನ್ ಇಷ್ಟು ಬೇಗ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲ್ತೆ? [How did you learn to speak English so quickly?] Speaker B: ಸೀಕ್ರೆಟ್ ಇದೆ, ಆದ್ರೂ ಹೇಳ್ತೀನಿ. SpeakX ಆಪ್. [There's a secret, but I'll tell you. SpeakX app.] Speaker A: ಏನು? SpeakX ಆಪ್? ಇದ್ರಿಂದ ಹೇಗೆ ಕಲ್ತೆ? [What? SpeakX app? How did you learn from this?] Speaker B: ಈ ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ AI ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರ್ತಾರೆ. ತುಂಬಾ ಈಸಿಯಾಗಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲ್ಸ್ತಾರೆ. ಚಿಕ್ಕ ಮಕ್ಕಳು ಕೂಡ ಪ್ರತಿದಿನ 10 ರಿಂದ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು, ಅವ್ರು ಕೂಡ 15 ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲ್ತಾರೆ. [In this app, there are AI teachers. They teach English very easily. Even young kids just need to practice for 10 to 15 minutes daily, they too will learn English in 15 days.] Speaker A: ಹೌದಾ, ನಿಜಾನಾ? [Is it, really?] Speaker B: ನೀವು ಟೈಮ್ ವೇಸ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಾ ಇದ್ದಾಗ ನಾನು ಈ ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. ಹೇಗೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾ? ಮ್ಯಾನೇಜರ್ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು, ಕಸ್ಟಮರ್ ಜೊತೆ ಡೀಲ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾಡ್ಬೇಕು, ಆಫೀಸ್ ಫ್ರೆಂಡ್ಸ್ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹೇಗೆ ಮಾತಾಡಬೇಕು... ಬರಿ 15 ದಿನದಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಇಷ್ಟು ಫ್ಲೂಯೆಂಟ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ ಅಂತ ನಾನು ಅನ್ಕೊಂಡಿರಲಿಲ್ಲ. [While you were wasting time, I was practicing on this app. You know how? How to speak English with a manager, how to deal with a customer, how to speak English with office friends... I didn't think my English would become this fluent in just 15 days.] Speaker A: ನಾನು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಇಂಟರ್ವ್ಯೂಸ್ ಅಲ್ಲೂ ರಿಜೆಕ್ಟ್ ಆಗ್ತಿದೀನಿ. ನಾನು ನಿಮ್ಮ ತರ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಇಂದ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಕಲಿಬಹುದಾ? [I am getting rejected in all interviews. Can I learn to speak English from this app like you?] Speaker B: ಇವತ್ತೇ SpeakX ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡು, ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಕಲಿ, ನಿಂಗೂ ಕೂಡ 100% ಜಾಬ್ ಗ್ಯಾರಂಟಿ. [Download the SpeakX app today, learn to speak English, and you too will have a 100% job guarantee.]
on_screen_text: Hey Manoj. Ning job sikkide ante, du 30,000 sambla. Ning English matadakke baralla, aadru hege? Who told you that? I learned speaking English in just 15 days. And job kuda sikkide. Nin ishtu bega English matadodu hege kalte? Secret ide aadru telteni. SpeakX app. Yenu? SpeakX app? idrinda hege kalte? alli AI teacher irtare. Tumba easy aagi English kalistare. Chikka makkalu kuda prati dina 10 rinda 15 minute practice madidre saku, avru kuda 15 dinadalli English kalitare. Houda, nijana? Neevu time waste madta iddaga ee app alli practice madtidde. Hege gotta? English hege matadabeku... deal hege madbeku... Office friends jote alli hege. Bari 15 dinadalli nanna English ishtu fluent agutte anta naanu ankondiralilla. Naanu yella interviews allu reject aagtidini. Nanu nim tara ee app inda English matadodu kalibuda? Ivatte SpeakX app download madu, English matadoke kali, ningu kuda 100% job guarantee. [Hey Manoj. I heard you got a job, with a 30,000 salary. You don't know how to speak English, but how? Who told you that? I learned speaking English in just 15 days. And also got a job. How did you learn to speak English so quickly? There is a secret but I'll tell you. SpeakX app. What? SpeakX app? how did you learn from this? there are AI teachers there. They teach English very easily. Even young kids just need to practice for 10 to 15 minutes daily, they also will learn English in 15 days. Is it, really? While you were wasting time, I was practicing in this app. You know how? How to speak English... how to deal... with office friends there how. In just 15 days I hadn't thought my English would become this fluent. I am getting rejected in all interviews. Can I learn to speak English from this app like you? Download the SpeakX app today, learn to speak English, for you also 100% job guarantee.]
summary: A woman is surprised that her friend secured a high-paying job despite his poor English. He credits his success to practicing daily with the SpeakX app's AI mentor. Facing constant interview rejections herself, she is motivated to download the app for a 7-day trial.
